tasks.description: Review the project context for task target "tst", identify whether it maps to an existing test, feature, or validation workflow, and record a minimal acceptance target before implementation begins.
tasks.expected_output: A concise scope note that defines the intended deliverable for "tst" and the checks required to accept it.

tasks.description: Inspect the codebase, configuration, and existing outputs to locate the files or modules most likely affected by the confirmed "tst" deliverable. This task benefits from same-server access because it requires local repository reads.
tasks.expected_output: A short implementation map listing the relevant files, commands, and any constraints found in the local workspace.

tasks.description: Apply the smallest code, configuration, or artifact change needed to satisfy the confirmed "tst" scope, following existing repository patterns and avoiding unrelated edits.
tasks.expected_output: Focused repository changes that implement the accepted "tst" deliverable.

tasks.description: Run the relevant local tests, build, lint, or smoke checks for the changed area. This task should be executed by the same-server agent because it may require local runtime files and workspace state.
tasks.expected_output: Validation results showing pass/fail status, commands used, and any residual risk if a check cannot be run.

tasks.description: Stage only the files belonging to this project output or the confirmed deliverable, create a focused commit, and push it to https://github.com/beautyarbutin/half_test.
tasks.expected_output: A pushed commit containing the completed plan and any approved deliverable files.
